name: Spawn Mob
desc: Spawns a living entity (mob/animal/monster) with entity type, position, rotation, velocity, and metadata.

implementation.overview: S0FPacketSpawnMob creates new EntityLivingBase mobs in the world. Used by KillAura (add mob to target list by entity type filter), ESP (box/tracer render on mobs), AntiBot (filter out fake mobs), and AntiAura modules that track entity spawns for target management.

modules.name: KillAura / ESP Mob Tracker
modules.purpose: Track mob spawns by entity ID and type for ESP rendering and KillAura target selection. Filter mobs by type (only hostile, only animals, etc.) and add to render/attack lists.
modules.how_it_works: When S0F arrives, the module extracts entityId and type (mob ID from EntityList). It adds the entity to tracked lists based on type filters (hostile = creeper/zombie/skeleton, passive = pig/cow, etc.). ESP renders boxes/tracers on tracked mobs. KillAura uses tracked list for target priority (e.g., attack hostile mobs before animals).
modules.vanilla_hook: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleSpawnMob(S0FPacketSpawnMob) — creates EntityLivingBase from EntityList by type, sets position/rotation/velocity/metadata.
modules.anti_cheat_notes: Mob tracking from S0F is passive and undetectable. Some anti-cheats spawn bot mobs with fake S0F packets to test KillAura — using anti-bot validation on mobs (check metadata for fake health values) helps filter these.

implementation.general_hooks:
Client: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleSpawnMob(S0FPacketSpawnMob) — creates EntityLivingBase, adds to WorldClient. PacketReceiveEvent fires in all major clients before handler.

Server: EntityTrackerEntry sends S0F when a living entity enters tracking range.
implementation.client_variations:
Rise 6.0: ESP/KillAura add mobs by type from S0F.
Sigma 4.11: Killaura filters mobs by type, adds to target list.
Tenacity 6.0: ESP renders S0F-spawned mobs with type-based colors.
RektSky B5: No specific S0F module.
Aqua 13: EventPacket fires.
